pi_items.source: Verified against setup_task.sh line 400: wb.save('/home/ga/Documents/financial_model.xlsx'). Confirmed file exists in live environment with correct ownership (ga:ga).
Verified against export_result.sh line 28 and task description. Agent must Save As to this path.
Verified against export_result.sh line 30 as ODS fallback path.
Verified against export_result.sh line 58: json.dump writes to this path.

Verified against verifier.py: passed = score >= metadata.get('pass_threshold', 55). Scoring: file exists (10) + IS NI correct (20) + BS balances (15) + CF ending matches BS (15) + debt negative (10) + audit sheet exists (20) + NI impact (10) = 100 total.

errors.label: Total COGS
errors.description: COGS double-counts Marketing expense (C19=8500) from the Operating Expenses section. Q3 formula =SUM(B9:B11) is correct and does not include Marketing.
errors.cascade: Changes Gross Profit, Operating Income, IBT, Net Income, BS Retained Earnings, CF Net Income

errors.label: Gross Margin %
errors.description: Gross Margin % references empty row C7 (blank separator between Revenue and COGS sections) instead of Total Revenue in C6. Q3 formula =B14/B6 correctly references B6.

errors.label: Total Operating Expenses
errors.description: OpEx SUM range ends at C21 (Utilities), missing Insurance (C22=2400) and Depreciation (C23=3750). Q3 formula =SUM(B18:B23) correctly includes all 6 expense categories.
errors.cascade: Changes Operating Income, IBT, Net Income

errors.label: Income Tax (25%)
errors.description: Tax is a hard-coded number instead of a formula referencing Income Before Tax. Q3 cell B29 correctly uses =B28*0.25. After fixing all other IS errors, correct IBT is 30500 and correct tax is 7625.

errors.label: QoQ Revenue Growth
errors.description: Growth formula uses subtraction instead of division. Shows dollar change (18000) formatted as percentage (1800000.0%) instead of actual growth rate (12.7%).

errors.label: Current Period Net Income
errors.wrong_value: References Operating Income (row 26) instead of Net Income (row 30)
errors.description: Cross-sheet reference points to Operating Income (IS row 26) instead of Net Income (IS row 30). Q3 formula ='Income Statement'!B30 correctly references Net Income. This causes BS to show MISMATCH.
errors.visibility: silent but causes visible MISMATCH on BS Balance Check

errors.label: Debt Repayment
errors.description: Debt Repayment should be negative (cash outflow) but is entered as positive. Short-term debt decreased from 20000 to 15000 per BS, confirming 5000 repayment. Sign should be negative per cash flow convention.

errors.label: Ending Cash
errors.description: Ending Cash is hard-coded as 92500 instead of =B22+B20 (Beginning Cash + Net Cash Change). Does not match BS Cash of 92725. After all fixes: 85000 + 7725 = 92725.
errors.visibility: silent but discoverable by cross-checking with BS Cash

accounting_identities.is_identity: Revenue (160000) - COGS (75500) - OpEx (52350) - Interest (1650) - Tax (7625) = Net Income (22875)
accounting_identities.bs_identity: Total Assets (205725) = Total Liabilities (78500) + Total Equity (127225)
accounting_identities.cf_identity: Operating (23625) + Investing (0) + Financing (-15900) = Net Cash Change (7725); Beginning (85000) + 7725 = Ending (92725)
accounting_identities.ni_tie: IS Net Income (22875) = CF Net Income (22875) = BS Current Period NI (22875)

income_statement.row_24: Total Operating Expenses (formula - ERROR #3 in Q4)

balance_sheet.row_20: Current Period Net Income (formula - ERROR #6 in Q4)
balance_sheet.row_26: Balance Check (IF formula - shows MISMATCH in Q4)

cash_flow.row_4: Net Income (cross-sheet ref to IS C30 - correct)

privileged_info_summary: The financial model spreadsheet has 3 sheets (Income Statement, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow Statement) for Q4 2024 with 8 deliberate formula errors. The Q3 column on the IS and BS is entirely correct and can be used as a reference for formula patterns. CORRECT Q4 values after fixing all errors: Total Revenue=160,000; COGS=75,500; Gross Profit=84,500; Gross Margin=52.8%; Total OpEx=52,350; Operating Income=32,150; IBT=30,500; Tax(25%)=7,625; Net Income=22,875. BS: Total Assets=205,725; Total Liabilities=78,500; Total Equity=127,225; Balance Check=OK. CF: Operating CF=23,625; Financing CF=-15,900; Net Cash Change=7,725; Ending Cash=92,725. The 8 errors are: (1) IS C12 Total COGS formula =SUM(C9:C11)+C19 adds Marketing 8500 from OpEx — fix by removing +C19, correct COGS=75,500; (2) IS C15 Gross Margin =C14/C7 references blank row 7 causing #DIV/0! — fix to =C14/C6; (3) IS C24 Total OpEx =SUM(C18:C21) misses Insurance and Depreciation — fix to =SUM(C18:C23), correct OpEx=52,350; (4) IS C29 Tax is hard-coded 8750 — fix to =C28*0.25, correct tax=7,625; (5) IS C32 QoQ Growth =C6-B6 uses subtraction instead of division — fix to =(C6-B6)/B6 for 12.7%; (6) BS C20 Net Income ref ='Income Statement'!C26 points to Operating Income not Net Income — fix to ='Income Statement'!C30; (7) CF B16 Debt Repayment is positive 5000 — fix to -5000; (8) CF B23 Ending Cash is hard-coded 92500 — fix to =B22+B20 for 92,725. The total dollar impact on Net Income is $3,475 (NI was understated from 22,875 to 19,400). The BS shows MISMATCH as a visible clue. The IS shows #DIV/0! in Gross Margin as another visible clue. The agent must create an Audit_Findings sheet documenting all errors and save as corrected_financial_model.xlsx.
